perspectives.name: Diversification Purist
perspectives.question: Is this portfolio actually diversified or does correlation erase paper diversification?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Effective diversification ratio below 0.70 (meaning correlation erodes 30%+ of nominal diversification) OR any correlated MSA group exceeding 40% of AUM

perspectives.name: Tail Risk Analyst
perspectives.question: What breaks in the 1-in-20 scenario that the base case ignores?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Portfolio does not survive severe combined stress (+300bps rate, -20% NOI, +100bps cap expansion) OR any single tail scenario produces negative equity in aggregate

perspectives.name: Vintage Decay Analyst
perspectives.question: Are older assets dragging returns while consuming disproportionate management attention?
perspectives.challengeThreshold: Assets older than 7 years represent more than 40% of AUM AND their trailing 4-quarter alpha is negative by more than 100bps vs portfolio average

verdictReconciliation: Challenge verdict overrides pipeline verdict if it differs. Diversification Purist and Tail Risk Analyst perspectives carry veto weight on BALANCED verdicts -- if either flags CRITICAL issues, verdict must escalate to REBALANCE or DISTRESSED.
